Class TextIndexDefinition

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index.TextIndexDefinition
All Implemented Interfaces:
IndexDefinition
public class TextIndexDefinition extends Object implements IndexDefinition
IndexDefinition to span multiple keys for text search.
Since:
1.6
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch
